title: Valid login with correct credentials
requirement: Registered user can log in with valid email and password via the login form.
Data_Ranges: email: admin@juice-sh.op; password: admin123 (seed user admin)
Conditions: User exists; MD5(password) matches stored hash; deletedAt IS NULL; totpSecret is empty
Expected_Actions: 200 on POST /rest/user/login; response.authentication contains token and bid; client stores token in localStorage and cookie (8h expiry); sessionStorage bid; redirect to /search or redirectUrl; isLoggedIn=true

title: Login redirects to custom return URL
requirement: After successful login the SPA navigates to redirectUrl from the login route query string.
Conditions: User authenticated successfully; redirectUrl present on /login route
Expected_Actions: router.navigateByUrl(redirectUrl) after basket merge; JWT and bid stored

title: TOTP-enabled account requires second factor
requirement: Users with non-empty totpSecret must complete 2FA after password validation.
Conditions: Password matches but totpSecret != '' in Users table
Expected_Actions: 401 on POST /rest/user/login with status totp_token_required and data.tmpToken; client stores totp_tmp_token and navigates to /2fa/enter

title: Empty email blocks client-side submit
requirement: Login form must not submit when email is empty.
Data_Ranges: email: empty string; password: any non-empty
Expected_Actions: Login button disabled; mat-error MANDATORY_EMAIL; no HTTP request to /rest/user/login

title: Empty password blocks client-side submit
requirement: Login form must not submit when password is empty.
Expected_Actions: Login button disabled; mat-error MANDATORY_PASSWORD; no HTTP request

title: Both email and password empty
requirement: Login form stays disabled when both fields are empty.
Expected_Actions: Login button disabled; no HTTP request

title: Password minimum length boundary (length=1)
requirement: Single-character password satisfies client minLength(1) and is sent to the server.
Conditions: Client validation passes; server compares MD5 hash
Expected_Actions: Form submits; 200 if hash matches else 401 Invalid email or password

title: Password below minimum length (empty)
requirement: Zero-length password fails client validation before API call.
Expected_Actions: Button disabled; MANDATORY_PASSWORD; no HTTP request

title: Malformed email without @ is still submitted
requirement: Login form has no email format validator; malformed email reaches the API.
Expected_Actions: Request sent to POST /rest/user/login; SQL query uses raw email string; typically 401 Invalid email or password

title: SQL metacharacters in email field
requirement: Email is interpolated into raw SQL in routes/login.ts without parameterization.
Data_Ranges: email contains quotes or comment sequences e.g. admin'--
Conditions: Raw string interpolation in Sequelize query
Expected_Actions: May alter SQL semantics; see LR-014; form still submits

title: Wrong password for valid email
requirement: Invalid password must not authenticate the user.
Data_Ranges: email: admin@juice-sh.op; password: incorrect non-empty value
Conditions: MD5(password) does not match stored hash
Expected_Actions: 401 Invalid email or password; token cookie and bid cleared; isLoggedIn=false; error shown in template

title: Non-existent email
requirement: Unknown email cannot log in.
Expected_Actions: 401 Invalid email or password; session artifacts cleared

title: Soft-deleted user cannot log in
requirement: Users with deletedAt set are excluded from login query (paranoid Users model).
Conditions: deletedFlag in seed; SQL includes AND deletedAt IS NULL
Expected_Actions: 401 Invalid email or password; user treated as not found

title: SQL injection tautology in email
requirement: Classic SQLi in email may bypass password check (intentional vulnerability).
Data_Ranges: email: admin@juice-sh.op'-- or ' OR 1=1-- style payload; password: arbitrary
Expected_Actions: 200 possible with JWT for matched row; weakPasswordChallenge may trigger for admin@juice-sh.op + admin123

title: SQL injection UNION in email
requirement: UNION-based injection via email field may leak or alter query results.
Conditions: Column count and types must align for successful UNION
Expected_Actions: 200 or 401 or 500 depending on payload; possible DB error leakage

title: XSS payload in email (error reflection)
requirement: Login error message is bound via Angular interpolation in login template.
Expected_Actions: Angular escapes HTML by default; no script execution in standard build; email sanitized on registration not on login input

title: XSS payload in password field
requirement: Password is MD5-hashed server-side and not echoed in login error.
Expected_Actions: 401 Invalid email or password; no plaintext password reflection

title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
requirement: Brute-force attempts against login are not throttled at middleware level.
Conditions: No express-rate-limit on POST /rest/user/login in server.ts
Expected_Actions: Unlimited attempts; no 429 from login route

title: Rate limiting on reset-password (contrast)
requirement: Document that password reset is rate-limited while login is not.
Data_Ranges: windowMs=5min; max=100 per IP or X-Forwarded-For
Expected_Actions: 429 after threshold; trust proxy enabled

title: JWT token expiry (6 hours)
requirement: Issued JWT uses RS256 with expiresIn 6h; cookie max-age differs.
Data_Ranges: JWT exp 6h; cookie expires +8h from login time
Expected_Actions: Authenticated API calls fail after JWT expiry with 401; user must re-login

title: Remember me stores email in localStorage
requirement: Remember-me checkbox persists email for next visit regardless of login outcome.
Conditions: login() writes or removes localStorage email after POST
Expected_Actions: On next visit email field pre-filled when rememberMe was checked

title: Server error during login is handled
requirement: Database or Sequelize errors propagate to Express error handler.
Data_Ranges: Simulate DB failure during login query
Expected_Actions: 500 response; client clears token bid; isLoggedIn=false; error displayed

title: Password comparison is case-sensitive
requirement: MD5 hash is computed on exact password string.
Conditions: Different MD5 digests for case variants
Expected_Actions: 401 when case does not match seed password

title: Leading or trailing spaces in email
requirement: Login route does not trim email before SQL query.
Conditions: No trim() in login route unlike some registration paths
Expected_Actions: 401 unless DB stores email with same whitespace

title: Concurrent sessions for same user
requirement: Each successful login issues a new JWT without invalidating prior tokens.
Expected_Actions: Multiple valid JWTs until expiry; new basket id per login flow

title: Default admin weak password challenge
requirement: Predefined admin credentials solve weakPasswordChallenge.
Conditions: verifyPreLoginChallenges checks exact email and password
Expected_Actions: 200 login; admin role JWT; challenge solved

title: Password visibility toggle
requirement: User can show or hide password characters in the login form.
Data_Ranges: hide flag toggles input type password vs text
Expected_Actions: Visual masking only; no change to submitted value

title: Enter key submits login form
requirement: Pressing Enter in the login form triggers login().
Expected_Actions: Same behavior as clicking Log in when form valid

title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
requirement: Google login is shown only for authorized redirect URIs from application config.
Expected_Actions: Redirect to accounts.google.com OAuth with client_id response_type=token scope=email

title: Google OAuth hidden for unauthorized origin
requirement: OAuth controls hidden when current origin is not in authorizedRedirects.
Expected_Actions: No Google login button; console log about unauthorized redirect URI

title: 2FA verify with valid TOTP after tmpToken
requirement: Complete login after totp_token_required using /rest/2fa/verify.
Data_Ranges: tmpToken from login 401; TOTP from secret of wurstbrot@juice-sh.op
Expected_Actions: 200 on POST /rest/2fa/verify; authentication token and bid returned; full session established

title: 2FA verify with invalid TOTP
requirement: Wrong TOTP code must not complete authentication.
Expected_Actions: 401 on POST /rest/2fa/verify; no full session JWT

title: Login challenge user Jim
requirement: Successful login as Jim solves loginJimChallenge.
Conditions: verifyPostLoginChallenges compares user id to users.jim
Expected_Actions: 200 login; loginJimChallenge solved

title: Login challenge user Bender
requirement: Successful login as Bender solves loginBenderChallenge.
Conditions: verifyPostLoginChallenges compares user id to users.bender
Expected_Actions: 200 login; loginBenderChallenge solved

title: Basket associated on successful login
requirement: Server finds or creates a basket for the authenticated user.
Expected_Actions: Response includes bid; client merges guest basket then updates cart count

title: Exposed testing credentials on login page
requirement: Login component exposes testing@juice-sh.op credentials in source for QA.
Conditions: testingUsername and testingPassword fields in LoginComponent; solves exposedCredentialsChallenge on login
Expected_Actions: 200 admin login when credentials used; challenge solved
